item.name: Applications

description.content: Operations for creating, querying, syncing, and deleting Argo CD GitOps applications.

item.name: Argo CD Argo List Applications

request.name: Argo CD Argo List Applications

description.content: Returns a list of all Argo CD applications, optionally filtered by project, namespace, or name. Each application includes its current sync status, health status, source configuration, and destination cluster details.

query.description: The application namespace to filter by.

response.name: List of applications.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Create an Application

request.name: Argo CD Argo Create an Application

description.content: Creates a new Argo CD application from the provided Application manifest. The application must reference a valid project, source repository, and destination cluster. Optionally upsert to update an existing application with the same name.

query.description: If true, perform an upsert rather than a create, updating the application if it already exists.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Get an Application

request.name: Argo CD Argo Get an Application

description.content: Returns the full specification and current status of a named Argo CD application, including sync status, health status, resource tree, and operation state.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Argo CD application.
(Required) The name of the Argo CD application.

item.name: Argo CD Argo Sync an Application

request.name: Argo CD Argo Sync an Application

description.content: Triggers a synchronization of the named Argo CD application, reconciling the live Kubernetes state with the desired state from the Git source. Supports selective resource sync, dry-run mode, force sync, and prune of removed resources.

request.name: Argo CD Argo Rollback an Application

description.content: Rolls back the named application to a previous deployed revision. Requires the ID of a history entry from the application's deployment history.

item.name: Clusters

description.content: Operations for registering and managing target Kubernetes clusters for application deployment.

item.name: Argo CD Argo List Clusters

request.name: Argo CD Argo List Clusters

description.content: Returns all registered Kubernetes clusters available as deployment targets for Argo CD applications.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Cluster

request.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Cluster

description.content: Registers a new Kubernetes cluster as a deployment target. The cluster must be reachable from the Argo CD server and the provided credentials must have sufficient permissions.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Projects

description.content: Operations for managing Argo CD projects that provide governance and access control for applications.

item.name: Argo CD Argo List Projects

request.name: Argo CD Argo List Projects

description.content: Returns all Argo CD projects. Projects provide logical grouping, access control, and policy enforcement for applications.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Create a Project

request.name: Argo CD Argo Create a Project

description.content: Creates a new Argo CD project with the specified source repositories, destination clusters/namespaces, and resource allow/deny policies.

item.name: Repositories

description.content: Operations for registering and managing Git and Helm chart repositories used as application sources.

item.name: Argo CD Argo List Repositories

request.name: Argo CD Argo List Repositories

description.content: Returns all registered Git and Helm chart repositories, including their connection status and type.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Repository

request.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Repository

description.content: Registers a new Git or Helm chart repository with Argo CD. Supports HTTPS, SSH, and GitHub App authentication methods.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Repository

description.content: Removes the named repository registration from Argo CD.

item.name: Session

description.content: Authentication operations for obtaining and invalidating bearer tokens.

item.name: Argo CD Argo Create a Session (login)

request.name: Argo CD Argo Create a Session (login)

description.content: Authenticates with username and password or SSO token and returns a bearer token for use in subsequent API requests.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Session (logout)

request.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Session (logout)

description.content: Invalidates the current bearer token, logging out the authenticated user.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Settings

description.content: Operations for reading Argo CD server configuration and settings.

item.name: Argo CD Argo Get Server Settings

request.name: Argo CD Argo Get Server Settings

description.content: Returns the Argo CD server configuration including OIDC settings, Helm settings, resource tracking method, and UI customization.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Version

description.content: Server version information endpoint.

item.name: Argo CD Argo Get Server Version

request.name: Argo CD Argo Get Server Version

description.content: Returns the Argo CD server version, build date, Git commit SHA, Go version, and Kubernetes server version.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Argo CD API provides REST endpoints for managing GitOps continuous delivery on Kubernetes. It enables creating and managing applications, projects, repositories, clusters, and certificates. The API supports syncing application state to match the desired state declared in Git, querying health and sync status, managing access control, and configuring notifications. All operations require authentication via bearer token obtained from the session endpoint.
